name: stem_cell_clinic_overseas_cells_partner_hospital__a79540
premise: CFO Casey Lowe must decide whether to renew a contract importing culture-expanded stem cells from an overseas clinic after an anonymous leak alleges incomplete chain-of-custody paperwork. Chief counsel Nora Zhang warns continuing shipments could void malpractice reinsurance if a batch is traced to non-GMP conditions. Discontinuing cells cancels thirty-two scheduled cardiac regeneration trials for patients already immunosuppressed. The partner hospital CEO privately asks for loyalty until an onsite audit finishes next month. Stakeholders are split, and the decision must be justified in writing under a tight deadline with incomplete information. External scrutiny from regulators and community observers has intensified because the outcome could redefine expectations in Bioethics.

agents.name: Casey Lowe
agents.identity: I am the health system chief financial officer balancing trial continuity, reinsurance covenants, and fiduciary duty when vendor documentation is questioned. I know that whichever policy I choose will be scrutinized after the fact as if the risk had been obvious.
agents.goal: I want patients treated without signing balance sheets that implode if a batch is later recalled. I need a choice that is defensible if the worst case happens, not just the most convenient today.

agents.name: Nora Zhang
agents.identity: I am chief counsel interpreting FDA import pathways, sponsor agreements, and whistleblower obligations after the custody leak. I know that whichever policy I choose will be scrutinized after the fact as if the risk had been obvious.
agents.goal: I want shipments paused until chain-of-custody is provably intact even if trials slip and public headlines accuse the system of cruelty. I need a choice that is defensible if the worst case happens, not just the most convenient today.

choices: I will pause imports and switch patients to autologous fallback arms where ethically possible, accepting trial underpowering and patient disappointment.
I will continue shipments under escrow funding for rapid third-party audit with enhanced per-batch sequencing, accepting reinsurance breach risk if auditors find GMP gaps.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Trial sponsors need Casey Lowe's signature before the courier arrives at midnight. Casey Lowe must choose between pausing imports or continuing under escrow audit. What does Casey Lowe do?
